mapper.select: SELECT p.DEFAULT_VALUE AS deployStatus, (SELECT q.DEFAULT_VALUE FROM FWK_PROPERTY q WHERE q.PROPERTY_GROUP_ID = 'notice' AND q.PROPERTY_ID = 'START_DTIME') AS startDtime, (SELECT q.DEFAULT_VALUE FROM FWK_PROPERTY q WHERE q.PROPERTY_GROUP_ID = 'notice' AND q.PROPERTY_ID = 'END_DTIME') AS endDtime, (SELECT q.DEFAULT_VALUE FROM FWK_PROPERTY q WHERE q.PROPERTY_GROUP_ID = 'notice' AND q.PROPERTY_ID = 'CLOSEABLE_YN') AS closeableYn, (SELECT q.DEFAULT_VALUE FROM FWK_PROPERTY q WHERE q.PROPERTY_GROUP_ID = 'notice' AND q.PROPERTY_ID = 'HIDE_TODAY_YN') AS hideTodayYn FROM FWK_PROPERTY p WHERE p.PROPERTY_GROUP_ID = 'notice' AND p.PROPERTY_ID = 'DEPLOY_STATUS'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FWK_PROPERTY_HISTORY WHERE PROPERTY_GROUP_ID = 'notice' AND PROPERTY_ID = 'USE_YN'
AND REASON = #{reason}

SELECT p.DEFAULT_VALUE AS deployStatus, (SELECT q.DEFAULT_VALUE FROM FWK_PROPERTY q WHERE q.PROPERTY_GROUP_ID = 'notice' AND q.PROPERTY_ID = 'START_DTIME') AS startDtime, (SELECT q.DEFAULT_VALUE FROM FWK_PROPERTY q WHERE q.PROPERTY_GROUP_ID = 'notice' AND q.PROPERTY_ID = 'END_DTIME') AS endDtime, (SELECT q.DEFAULT_VALUE FROM FWK_PROPERTY q WHERE q.PROPERTY_GROUP_ID = 'notice' AND q.PROPERTY_ID = 'CLOSEABLE_YN') AS closeableYn, (SELECT q.DEFAULT_VALUE FROM FWK_PROPERTY q WHERE q.PROPERTY_GROUP_ID = 'notice' AND q.PROPERTY_ID = 'HIDE_TODAY_YN') AS hideTodayYn FROM FWK_PROPERTY p WHERE p.PROPERTY_GROUP_ID = 'notice' AND p.PROPERTY_ID = 'DEPLOY_STATUS' FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE FWK_PROPERTY SET DEFAULT_VALUE = CASE PROPERTY_ID WHEN 'DEPLOY_STATUS' THEN 'DEPLOYED' WHEN 'START_DTIME' THEN #{startDtime} WHEN 'END_DTIME' THEN NULL END, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME = #{lastUpdateDtime}, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID = #{lastUpdateUserId} WHERE PROPERTY_GROUP_ID = 'notice' AND PROPERTY_ID IN ('DEPLOY_STATUS', 'START_DTIME', 'END_DTIME')

UPDATE FWK_PROPERTY SET DEFAULT_VALUE = CASE PROPERTY_ID WHEN 'DEPLOY_STATUS' THEN 'ENDED' WHEN 'END_DTIME' THEN #{endDtime} END, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME = #{lastUpdateDtime}, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID = #{lastUpdateUserId} WHERE PROPERTY_GROUP_ID = 'notice' AND PROPERTY_ID IN ('DEPLOY_STATUS', 'END_DTIME')
UPDATE FWK_PROPERTY SET DEFAULT_VALUE = #{value}, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME = #{lastUpdateDtime}, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID = #{lastUpdateUserId} WHERE PROPERTY_GROUP_ID = 'notice' AND PROPERTY_ID = 'CLOSEABLE_YN'

UPDATE FWK_PROPERTY SET DEFAULT_VALUE = #{value}, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME = #{lastUpdateDtime}, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID = #{lastUpdateUserId} WHERE PROPERTY_GROUP_ID = 'notice' AND PROPERTY_ID = 'HIDE_TODAY_YN'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FWK_PROPERTY_HISTORY ( PROPERTY_GROUP_ID, PROPERTY_ID, VERSION, PROPERTY_NAME, PROPERTY_DESC, DATA_TYPE, VALID_DATA, DEFAULT_VALUE, REASON, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME ) SELECT P.PROPERTY_GROUP_ID, P.PROPERTY_ID, NVL((SELECT MAX(H.VERSION) FROM FWK_PROPERTY_HISTORY H WHERE H.PROPERTY_GROUP_ID = 'notice'), 0) + 1, P.PROPERTY_NAME, P.PROPERTY_DESC, P.DATA_TYPE, P.VALID_DATA, P.DEFAULT_VALUE, #{reason}, #{lastUpdateUserId}, #{lastUpdateDtime} FROM FWK_PROPERTY P WHERE P.PROPERTY_GROUP_ID = 'notice'
